mano_cua.result_summary: 发现2个bug: 1)Slider拖动后值重置-拖动松开后滑块弹回初始位置(value=0),紫色填充消失,拖动操作无效 2)Button点击后持续高亮-点击Button1后移开鼠标,Button1保持浅紫色高亮而其他按钮为深紫色,focus/active样式未清除
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug1: Slider value resets to 0 after drag release. Bug2: Button1 maintains lighter purple highlight after click+mouse away, while Button2&3 show normal dark purple. Both indicate CSS state management issues.
